# RAS-VERTEX

> Sunshine Coast commercial property maintenance — painting, building cleaning, waterproofing, height safety, and IRATA-certified rope access for body corporates, strata committees, and commercial property managers.

## About

RAS-VERTEX is a Queensland-based building maintenance contractor operating across the Sunshine Coast. We are QBCC licensed, carry $20M public liability insurance, and hold IRATA Level 1–3 rope access certification in-house. We've been operating for 25+ years.

## Services

- **Commercial & Strata Painting** — interior and exterior repaints for high-rise, mid-rise, commercial buildings, and residential strata. QBCC licensed. Product warranties up to 10 years.
- **Building & Window Cleaning** — facade washing, high-pressure cleaning, high-rise window cleaning via rope access. Regular maintenance programs available.
- **Waterproofing** — balcony membranes, roof waterproofing, leak detection (thermal imaging), remedial injection works. Systems specified to AS 3740.
- **Height Safety** — anchor point installation, static line systems, roof access compliance, annual recertification to AS/NZS 1891. Full compliance management programs.
- **Building Maintenance** — preventative maintenance programs, facade inspections, spalling concrete remediation, emergency repairs. Single-contractor programs for strata.
- **Rope Access** — IRATA-certified technicians for access to any height. Eliminates scaffold for most inspection, cleaning, and maintenance tasks.

## Service Area

Sunshine Coast, QLD — from Caloundra to Noosa, including Mooloolaba, Maroochydore, Kawana, Sippy Downs, Coolum, Peregian, Noosaville, Nambour, and the hinterland.

## Credentials

- QBCC Licensed (painting, building work, waterproofing)
- IRATA Levels 1, 2, and 3 in-house
- $20M public liability insurance
- Workers' compensation cover
- Certificates of currency issued at quote stage

## Blog topics

The RAS-VERTEX blog covers practical building maintenance topics for Sunshine Coast property managers, body corporate committees, and strata managers — including painting guides, waterproofing failure patterns, rope access vs scaffold comparisons, 10-year maintenance planning, and height safety compliance.
